name: kotoba
title: 言葉
description: Japanese dictionary, translator, and Anki integration — search Jotoba, translate sentences, add cards to Anki
author: kuro

commands.name: kotoba
commands.title: Kotoba
commands.subtitle: Japanese Dictionary & Translator
commands.description: Search Jotoba for words, kanji, and sentences; add to Anki; TTS with ElevenLabs

preferences.name: ankiDeck
preferences.title: Anki Deck Name
preferences.description: The name of your Anki deck for Japanese vocabulary

preferences.name: ankiModel
preferences.title: Anki Note Type/Model
preferences.description: The note type to use (e.g., Basic-d5482, MIA Japanese)

preferences.name: elevenlabsApiKey
preferences.title: ElevenLabs API Key
preferences.description: API key for ElevenLabs text-to-speech (leave empty to disable TTS)

preferences.name: elevenlabsVoiceId
preferences.title: ElevenLabs Voice ID
preferences.description: Voice ID for ElevenLabs TTS (default: 21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM — Rachel)

preferences.name: showTranslationImage
preferences.title: Show Translation Image
preferences.description: Show a relevant image below the translation (requires Google Custom Search API)

preferences.name: gcsApiKey
preferences.title: Google Custom Search API Key
preferences.description: API key for Google Custom Search (for translation images). Get one at https://console.cloud.google.com

preferences.name: gcsCxId
preferences.title: Google Custom Search Engine ID (cx)
preferences.description: Search Engine ID for Google Custom Search. Create one at https://cse.google.com/cse/

preferences.name: autoLoadText
preferences.title: Auto-load selected text
preferences.description: Automatically load selected text from clipboard
